dogfoodPatterns.pattern: PreToolUse hook exits non-zero after 1st write, blocks QA multi-write sessions
dogfoodPatterns.description: First gh issue create succeeds. All subsequent gh write operations (issue create, api POST, shell commands) exit non-zero with 'allowed by default | (attempt 1/3)' message. PreToolUse has no --store sqlite; PostToolUse does. Suspected: unknown-command warn+audit logic (#179) treating repeated actions as escalation attempts without session persistence. QA Backlog Steward capped at 1 write/session.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Kernel squad investigate: does unknown-command warn+audit return non-zero for allowed-by-default actions? Missing --store sqlite on PreToolUse loses session state between invocations.

dogfoodPatterns.description: Multiple copilot-driver agents report version as unknown.
